title: papaver stubendorfii
intro: Papaver stubendorfii, also known as the Stubendorf poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Papaver stubendorfii are said to have health benefits such as pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved sleep quality. It is often prepared as a herbal tea or used in tincture form, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
